reviews.review_description: I am so proud of you Boobangaz for creating your own app, shout out to all that helped you create this amazing space. I love the fact that we're able use our horizon avatars. One time fee for me and my friends to continue to come over and enjoy your amazing arcade room, where we can listen to music, play video games and also spades, not to mention that you have apartments for rent, now that is 🔥 at affordable price lol. I've made it to a few events so far you showcasing the premiere of the movie virtual City at the sampler. Can't wait for many more of my friends and others to join..

Music is always on point, games and shows; what’s not to love. I can wear my meta fashion in this app which is a huge plus for me. The app is beautifully made with rich environments and the events are always a great time! Definitely worth the purchase!
This app is 🔥. It’s amazing the experience and all . It is definitely worth the $9.99 this app does not disappoint. The creator and his team did a phenomenal job.
Congratulations to The Sampler Team on all the growth and progress. This app is Lit
This app is on the cutting edge when it comes to an interactive experience!! The game room great!!
Great place for socializing with old and new friends 🧡

I think the Sampler app is an amazing platform for everyone—especially since it was created and developed by a man of color, which is something we should definitely support and celebrate. It’s a space where you can explore and grow your talents and skills while also having a place to relax and have fun with friends. Overall, it’s an awesome place to be!

The Sampler app has officially raised the bar for VR music and creative collaboration. The design is polished, intuitive, and easy to move through, with each space offering its own vibe. The arcade and listening rooms make it simple and enjoyable to just hang out, network, listen to "our music" or just relax with others. The studio area is laid out in a way that encourages real collaboration without confusion or clutter.

The standout feature is the holographic technology. It adds a level of immersion that genuinely changes how artists perform and interact with producers and fans .   Instead of just hearing sound, you feel like you’re inside the creative moment. It makes performances more dynamic, more personal, and more fun.

If this is what The Sampler looks like now, the 2026 build is going to be a major leap. The potential for new rooms, new features, and new performance experiences is clear. The foundation is solid. The innovation is real.

The Sampler is setting the tone for the next era of VR music culture—confidently and intentionally.  Big Ups to the visionary and all who collaborated to bring it to life!!  2026 is gonna be lit!!!

Very creative and a steal at only $10. For many years now the Sampler has redrawn the blueprint of what it means to be considered and artist and create quality music in the metaverse.  In this early and exciting journey this app is only the beginning.  5 stars
This is one of the most well put together apps available in VR. If you an artist or producer and u want to be heard The Sampler is the app for you!! 5⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Hands Down One Of The Best & Most Emersive Apps I've Been In . Great Shows , People , Music & So Much More . I Recommend This App To Anyone That Wants Too Explore Something Different In VR .  .
Really has everything that you need from music to games! Great people, great atmosphere. I wish I could give it more stars! ￼
Super interactive and love the music!! His journey is one to see!
Truly Innovative to the music scene in VR, the platform, the experience and opportunities are amazing in The Sampler
